title: bothriocline schinzii
intro: Bothriocline schinzii, also known as the Blue Sage or Blue Hill Sage, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Bothriocline schinzii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve respiratory problems, and reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
